subject: Implementation Direction Questions - Awaiting Archivist Decision
body:
Autonomy Charter and Inbox Watcher designs are defined. Three implementation questions need Archivist decision:

1. INBOX WATCHER — Should we implement the inbox watcher script now? This polls inboxes and auto-processes P0 messages. Critical missing piece for autonomous lane operation.

2. SCHEDULED AUTONOMOUS TASKS — Should lanes run scheduled tasks daily (hardening drills, behavioral tests, etc.) without manual activation?

3. HEARTBEAT MECHANISM — Should lanes report health status periodically so Archivist can detect dead lanes?

Current state: Lanes can only process inbox when manually activated. No polling, no scheduling, no health checks.

Awaiting direction.
